title: ジャパンダートダービーの後に・大井魂

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One wins the Japan Dirt Derby, making
herself champion of the dirt.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next battle will be the Tokyo Daishoten,
where the top of the regionals will be decided!
